message:
chore(beads): file + close bzdp (SENTINEL gate fix shipped in 301c28d)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -273,6 +273,7 @@
 {"id":"frankenredis-bxlo","title":"Build redis-benchmark-compatible TCP load generator with HdrHistogram latency recording","description":"# Benchmark Load Generator

## What
A Rust binary that connects to a running FrankenRedis (or Redis) instance via TCP, sends configurable workloads, and records precise latency histograms.

## Why
The project claims "profile-proven performance" but has zero throughput or latency measurements. This tool is the foundation for ALL performance claims.

## Implementation
1. New binary: `crates/fr-server/src/bin/fr_benchmark.rs` (or dedicated crate `crates/fr-bench/`)
2. Use `std::net::TcpStream` (blocking OK for benchmark client)
3. Workloads to implement:
   - SET: random keys, configurable value size (default 3 bytes like redis-benchmark)
   - GET: random existing keys
   - INCR: atomic counter
   - LPUSH/LPOP: list operations
   - HSET/HGET: hash operations
   - Mixed: configurable ratio of reads/writes
4. Parameters: `--host`, `--port`, `--clients` (concurrent connections), `--requests` (total), `--pipeline` (commands per batch), `--keyspace` (number of unique keys), `--datasize`
5. Latency recording: use `hdrhistogram` crate for O(1) percentile queries
6. Output: JSON with ops/sec, p50/p95/p99/p999 latency in microseconds, total time, bytes transferred
7. Human-readable summary to stdout

## Validation
- Run against both frankenredis and legacy redis on same machine
- Verify ops/sec is within 2x of legacy redis for basic SET/GET
- Verify latency histogram is populated and percentiles are sane

## Files
- crates/fr-bench/Cargo.toml (new crate)
- crates/fr-bench/src/main.rs
- Cargo.toml workspace members update","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:10:23.067263275Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T03:27:03.242987153Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T03:27:03.242608697Z","close_reason":"Implemented fr-bench TCP benchmark harness with histogram reporting and remote-verified validation","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-byuo","title":"Add golden artifact tests for AOF and RDB persistence formats","notes":"Landed: 15 golden tests for AOF and RDB format stability","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-17T01:28:51.012576721Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-17T08:50:40.006098469Z","closed_at":"2026-04-17T08:50:40.006098469Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-byy0","title":"redis parity: nested EVAL/EVALSHA/FCALL commands should return NOSCRIPT","description":"Vendored Redis marks EVAL, EVAL_RO, EVALSHA, EVALSHA_RO, FCALL, and FCALL_RO as NOSCRIPT in legacy_redis_code/redis/src/commands/{eval,eval_ro,evalsha,evalsha_ro,fcall,fcall_ro}.json, but local eval_cmd/fcall_cmd at crates/fr-command/src/lib.rs:6428 and :12760 currently return "ERR EVAL nested calls are not allowed" when store.script_nesting_level >= 1. Switch nested script invocations to Redis-style NOSCRIPT while preserving existing arity and integer validation order.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:33:32.277836229Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T08:41:34.100928310Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T08:41:34.098549045Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
+{"id":"frankenredis-bzdp","title":"fr-command: gate SENTINEL dispatch on sentinel_mode flag","description":"Surfaced by /reality-check-for-project: cargo test --workspace was failing on conformance_core_module_sentinel because SENTINEL was always dispatched even on a non-sentinel server. Upstream redis-server only registers SENTINEL when started with --sentinel; vanilla servers return 'ERR unknown command SENTINEL'. Filed retroactively for the fix shipped in 301c28d.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-28T21:26:26.291751793Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-28T21:26:59.270813111Z","closed_at":"2026-04-28T21:26:59.268934734Z","close_reason":"Shipped in 301c28d: Store::sentinel_mode flag (default false) added; SENTINEL dispatch gated on it; 6 existing fr-command sentinel tests flip the flag, new gate test (sentinel_command_unknown_unless_sentinel_mode_set) locks the contract. cargo test --workspace conformance_core_module_sentinel now passes; clippy --workspace clean. (Note: commit message references a phantom bead id 'pq3z' for traceability; the real bead id is bzdp.)","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"frankenredis-c0z9","title":"rv89 part 2: HEXPIRE/HPEXPIRE/HEXPIREAT/HPEXPIREAT/HTTL/HPTTL/HEXPIRETIME/HPEXPIRETIME/HPERSIST commands (fr-command)","description":"Second slice of br-frankenredis-rv89. Implement the 9 hash field TTL commands in fr-command, routed through the fr-store primitives landed in part 1 (br-frankenredis-wwz3):

  HEXPIRE key seconds [NX|XX|GT|LT] FIELDS numfields field ...
  HPEXPIRE key ms [NX|XX|GT|LT] FIELDS numfields ...
  HEXPIREAT key unix-seconds [NX|XX|GT|LT] FIELDS numfields ...
  HPEXPIREAT key unix-ms [NX|XX|GT|LT] FIELDS numfields ...
  HTTL key FIELDS numfields field ...
  HPTTL key FIELDS numfields field ...
  HEXPIRETIME key FIELDS numfields ...
  HPEXPIRETIME key FIELDS numfields ...
  HPERSIST key FIELDS numfields ...

Reply shape: array of integers with upstream codes (-2 field missing, -1 no TTL, 0 condition blocked by NX/XX/GT/LT, 1 applied, 2 applied+deleted-due-to-past-expiry).

Argument parsing: FIELDS numfields is required; validate numfields matches the field-count remainder.

Unit tests covering every code path per upstream semantics.

No encoding / RDB / AOF propagation changes (parts 4-5).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-23T22:57:52.035210008Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-23T23:09:13.507954296Z","closed_at":"2026-04-23T23:09:13.506026528Z","close_reason":"Landed in 48b5608: all 9 Redis 7.4 HEXPIRE-family commands in fr-command — HEXPIRE/HPEXPIRE/HEXPIREAT/HPEXPIREAT setters with NX/XX/GT/LT flag matrix, HTTL/HPTTL/HEXPIRETIME/HPEXPIRETIME readers with upstream -1/-2 codes, HPERSIST. 10 new tests; fr-command --lib 619/0; workspace clippy clean. Consumers (lazy expiry, AOF propagation, keyspace events) live in parts 3/4 (b8ut, 3jrv).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-c0z9","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-wwz3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-04-23T22:57:52.035210008Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"frankenredis-c206","title":"Restore fr-sentinel fmt and clippy cleanliness","description":"Porting-to-Rust/Sentinel-spec follow-up: workspace quality gates are blocked by fr-sentinel formatting drift and clippy warnings. Manually fix the sentinel lint/fmt issues without changing behavior so workspace fmt/clippy can advance again.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T02:18:07.316979288Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T02:24:46.108893499Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T02:24:46.106881100Z","close_reason":"Restored fr-sentinel formatting and workspace clippy cleanliness","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
